title: eclipta prostrata var. zippeliana
intro: Eclipta prostrata var. zippeliana, also known as Eclipta or Bhringaraj, is a type of herbaceous perennial plant native to Asia and Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Eclipta include promoting hair growth, improving skin and liver function, and supporting the immune system. Eclipta is traditionally prepared as a tea, oil, or powder, and is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine to support overall well-being.
